info.name: Storage (GraphQL API)
info.description:
GraphQL API for storage-only operations: Auth, S3 (files, CSV upload, delete), and Upload (multipart status, presigned URL, register part, abort).

**Setup:**
1. Set baseUrl (e.g. http://localhost:8000), email, password.
2. Run Auth > Login; copy accessToken (and optionally refreshToken, userId) into environment.
3. All S3 and Upload requests use Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}.

**CSV multipart flow:** s3.initiateCsvUpload → upload.presignedUrl (per part) → upload part to URL → upload.registerPart → s3.completeCsvUpload.

**Variables:** Use camelCase (fileKey, uploadId, partNumber, fileSize). **Docs:** sql/apis/07_S3_MODULE.md, 10_UPLOAD_MODULE.md (Queries and mutations – parameters and variable types); sql/postman/README.md; TASK_BREAKDOWN_STORAGE_GRAPHQL_POSTMAN.md.

request.description: Login to get accessToken. Copy accessToken (and optionally refreshToken, userId) from response into environment. All other requests use Bearer {{accessToken}}.

item.name: S3

request.description: List CSV files. Optional prefix (e.g. upload/ or exports/). See 07_S3_MODULE.md.
Presigned download URL. Optional expiresIn (seconds). See 07_S3_MODULE.md.
Start CSV multipart upload. Returns uploadId (use as upload_id for Upload steps), fileKey. Then use upload.presignedUrl, upload.registerPart, s3.completeCsvUpload. See 07_S3_MODULE.md.
Complete CSV multipart upload. upload_id from s3.initiateCsvUpload. See 07_S3_MODULE.md.
Delete a file by key. See 07_S3_MODULE.md.

item.description: S3 module: list, info, data, download URL, schema, CSV initiate/complete, delete. See 07_S3_MODULE.md.

item.name: Upload

request.description: Multipart session status. upload_id from s3.initiateCsvUpload. See 10_UPLOAD_MODULE.md.
Presigned URL for one part. Use upload_id as uploadId, then PUT part to URL; use returned etag in Register Part. See 10_UPLOAD_MODULE.md.
Register uploaded part. uploadId = upload_id from initiate; partNumber; etag from PUT response. See 10_UPLOAD_MODULE.md.

item.description: Upload module: status, presigned URL, register part, abort. Used with s3.initiateCsvUpload and s3.completeCsvUpload for CSV flow. See 10_UPLOAD_MODULE.md.
